summary:
The statement "the latent phase begins after the active phase" is incorrect because the latent phase actually spans from 0-5 cm cervical dilation while the active phase starts around 6 cm. \boxed{B}

The other options are either correctly defined or do not apply as they pertain more broadly rather than specifically addressing when labor phases begin/end which was central for answering 'not' being accurate regarding latency vs activity transition timing. Agent1 focused strictly on defining these critical timepoints accurately per medical guidelines provided.
